spec_match.rationale: Excellent representation of margin box calculations.

interactive.rationale: Inputs are interactive and support real horizontal dragging to verify horizontal bounds.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly addresses form field overflow bugs.

edge_cases.rationale: Toggles warnings when stretch is unsupported in the current browser.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to core css styles and colors.

summary: A functional two-column resizing form illustrating how stretch solves margin-related overflows.
